4.text: The DIFC Courts Small Claims – Additional Member of the SCTTribunal (/glossary/tribunal/)

5.text: I, Michael Hwang, of the Dubai International Financial Centre Chief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) , Courts (/glossary/court/)

7.text: Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the establishment of the ;DIFC (/glossary/difc/) Dubai Law No. 12 Of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC; DIFC Law No. 10 of 2004 in respect of the DIFC Courts (“DIFC Courts Law”);

8.text: DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 establishing the Small Claims Tribunal (“SCT”);

9.text: DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2010 – Limits of ;Jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)

10.text: DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2014 – Members of the SCT

11.text: Practice Direction No. 2 of 2010 – SCT ; andJudge (/glossary/judge/)

12.text: Part 53 of the of the DIFC CourtsRules (/glossary/rules/)

14.text: (A) The DIFC Courts Law authorises the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts, where he considers it appropriate, to set up and administer Tribunals of the DIFC Courts, and to authorise for their rules (/glossary/rules/) administration, which shall be set out in the Rules of (Article 14(3)).Court (/glossary/court/)

15.text: (B) The SCT was established pursuant to DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 issued by the then Chief Justice, Sir Anthony Evans.

16.text: (C) The Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”) have been enacted by His Highness The of Ruler (/glossary/ruler/) Dubai pursuant to Article 31(1) of the and contain at Part 53 the rules relating toCourt Law (/glossary/court-law/) the SCT; and

17.text: (D) The SCT is recognised as a mechanism for the prompt and cost-effi cient hearing and determination of smaller claims within the of the DIFC Courts. jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)

18.text: Now I hereby order and direct as follows –

19.text:
Ms. Mariam Deen shall be appointed as a member of the SCT. Where the RDC refers to a “SCT Judge” this shall include the Court of First Instance and and allJudges (/glossary/judge/) Registrar (/glossary/registrar/) other persons named in this Order and DIFC Courts Order 1 of 2010 (Limits of Jurisdiction) as members of the SCT.   
This Order shall take effect from the date of signature. Order No. 2 of 2007 shall remain in full force and effect save as amended by this Order. This Order shall be known as The DIFC Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Members of the SCT Order No. 2 of 2016.

20.text: Chief Justice Michael Hwang Dated: 28 September 2016
